title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.320 - Suits may be brought in circuit courts
text:
70.320.  Suits may be brought in circuit courts. — Suits affecting any of the terms of any contract may be brought in the circuit court of the county in which any contracting municipality or political subdivision is located or in the circuit court of the county in which a party to the contract resides.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 401 § 7403j)
